title: Fix finance section stats and add Samaleswari Temple hero background

requirements.text: Update the BankFinanceBanner component to clearly display the correct financing terms: 90% loan approved by bank and 10% paid by the customer. Update all related translation strings in English, Hindi, and Odia (translations.ts) to reflect '90% Bank Loan' and '10% Customer Payment' accurately. Ensure stat cards and any descriptive text in the banner reflect these exact figures.

quotes: make correction the finance part -easy bank finance available 90% loan approved and 10% customer paid

acceptanceCriteria: BankFinanceBanner displays '90%' as the bank loan/approval figure
BankFinanceBanner displays '10%' as the customer payment figure
Section heading or subheading reads 'Easy Bank Finance Available' (or translated equivalent)
Translation strings in all three languages (EN/HI/OD) are updated with the correct percentages
No other financing figures appear that contradict 90/10 split

requirements.text: Replace the current hero background in the Hero component with the newly generated Samaleswari Temple Sambalpur image (samaleswari-temple-hero.dim_1920x1080.png) stored in frontend/public/assets/generated/. Ensure the image is set as the full-screen background with an appropriate dark overlay so that headline text and CTA buttons remain clearly legible.

quotes: Add samleswari temple sambalpur as hero background

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section background shows the Samaleswari Temple Sambalpur image
Image covers the full viewport width and height (object-cover or equivalent)
Dark overlay ensures all hero text and buttons are readable
No broken image or fallback color visible on load

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Preserve all existing i18n translation keys; only update values related to the finance section
Keep the WhatsApp CTA button and all other hero section content intact
nonGoals: Changing the backend schema or lead submission logic
Adding new form fields or sections beyond the finance correction
Redesigning the overall color theme or layout

required: Photorealistic wide-angle daytime view of Samaleswari Temple, Sambalpur, Odisha – ornate Hindu temple architecture with bright sky and lush surroundings (samaleswari-temple-hero.dim_1920x1080.png)
